mapper.select: SELECT r.id as r_id, r.user_id as r_user_id, r.product_id as r_product_id, r.order_id as r_order_id, r.rating as r_rating, r.content as r_content, r.images as r_images, r.created_at as r_created_at, r.updated_at as r_updated_at, p.id as p_id, p.name as p_name, p.price as p_price, p.image as p_image FROM review r LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (user_id, product_id, order_id, rating, content, images, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{orderId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{images}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.user_id as userId, r.product_id as productId, r.order_id as orderId, r.rating, r.content, r.images, r.created_at as createdAt, r.updated_at as updatedAt, p.name as productName FROM review r LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id

SELECT r.id, r.user_id as userId, r.product_id as productId, r.order_id as orderId, r.rating, r.content, r.images, r.created_at as createdAt, r.updated_at as updatedAt, p.name as productName FROM review r LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.user_id as userId, r.product_id as productId, r.order_id as orderId, r.rating, r.content, r.images, r.created_at as createdAt, r.updated_at as updatedAt, p.name as productName FROM review r LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT r.id, r.user_id as userId, r.product_id as productId, r.order_id as orderId, r.rating, r.content, r.images, r.created_at as createdAt, r.updated_at as updatedAt, p.name as productName FROM review r LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 5
